rulings.Case Title: JAMESTOWN PREMIER GHRSQ, L.P. VS. LE MARIAS GHIRARDELLI SQUARE LLC, ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Terms Of Settlement Agreement Pursuant To C.C.P. 664.6
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October 24, 2018 line 3. PLAINTIFF JAMESTOWN PREMIER GHRSQ, L.P. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Terms Of Settlement Agreement Pursuant To C.C.P. 664.6 GRANTED. Judgment in favor of Plaintiff shall enter for $62,588.88 ($60,588.88 in damages and $2,000 in attorney's fees). No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARGARET PETTY-EIFERT VS. AVIANO ENTERPRISES, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default Entered Against Defendant Aviano Enterprises, Inc.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October 24, 2018 line 7. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default Entered Against Defendant Aviano Enterprises, Inc. GRANTED, subject to (1) no later than 9:00 a.m. on October 24, 2018 Defendant (by Mr. Deluca) shall file a declaration under the penalty of perjury stating the facts giving rise to this motion re: surprise, mistake or excusable neglect. The declaration must include the date when this action was tendered to insurance, the dates of any follow-up inquiries, and the date when defense was accepted; (2) no later than 9:00 a.m. on October 24, 2018 Defendant's counsel shall submit a declaration explaining the delay in filing of this motion between August 27, 2018 (Plaintiff's refusal to stipulate) and September 21, 2018 (filing of this motion); and (2) payment of Plaintiff's fees incurred in obtaining the default and opposing this motion. Plaintiff shall provide a declaration re: attorney's fees no later than 9:00 a.m. on October 24, 2018. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: K. MIRANDA VS. DEBBY TOMCK ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn For Order To Compel K. Miranda Prop Mgr. To Attend And Testify At Deposition And Award Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October 24, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANT DEBBY TOMEK Ntc Of Mtn For Order To Compel K. Miranda Prop Mgr. To Attend And Testify At Deposition And Award Sanctions GRANTED. Both the Deposition and the Motion are set on proper 5-day notice. K. Miranda to appear at deposition and produce documents on a date noticed by Defendant between October 29 and November 2, 2018. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,330. = (501/REQ)
